report_name: UK's NCSC Unveils 'SilentGlass' Hardware to Block Malware via HDMI and DisplayPort

identities.name: UK National Cyber Security Centre
identities.description: Developer of the 'SilentGlass' hardware data diode. The NCSC is part of GCHQ.

identities.name: GCHQ
identities.description: The UK's intelligence, security and cyber agency, and the parent organization of the NCSC.

identities.name: Goldilock Labs
identities.description: A UK firm licensed by the NCSC to manufacture and sell the 'SilentGlass' hardware device.

identities.name: Sony UK
identities.description: A partner with Goldilock Labs in the manufacturing and sales of the 'SilentGlass' device.

identities.name: UK Government
identities.description: An early adopter and user of the SilentGlass device in high-security environments.

identities.name: Critical National Infrastructure
identities.description: A key target sector for the commercial release of the SilentGlass device to protect operator consoles in environments like power plants and water treatment facilities.
